title: Is International Paper (IP) a Suitable Value Investor Stock?
text: Let's see if International Paper (IP) stock is a good choice for value-oriented investors right now from multiple angles.

title: Why Hold Strategy is Apt for International Paper (IP) Stock Now
text: International Paper (IP) gains from strong demand for corrugated and containerboard packaging, fluff pulp and focus on cost-reduction actions.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch in a Promising Paper and Related Products Industry
text: Strong packaging demand for consumer-oriented products and the e-commerce boom will benefit the likes of IP, VRTV and CLW in the Zacks Paper and Related Products industry despite the ongoing high input costs and supply-chain headwinds.
